Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the music room. It seems to[n]be where the music club meets.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That reminds me, Ryoji said he wanted[n]me to come to the music room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ryoji said he wanted me to[n]come to the music room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]after school with Ryoji?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the music room. It seems to[n]be where the music club meets.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can see a grand piano inside through[n]the frosted glass window...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the music room. It seems to[n]be where the music club meets.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Through the frosted window, it feels like the[n]portraits of musicians are looking at me...[n]{f 1 1}
